emails.subject: Monday's Conference Call
emails.body: Monday's Conference Call Jeff Sorry for the delay in getting back to you. I do not have any notes from Monday's Dynegy conference call, but the script has been filed w/ the SEC and it's on our website under "Investor Relations SEC filings." Let me know if you need anything else. Karen x39757

emails.subject: RE: Monday's Conference Call
emails.body: RE: Monday's Conference Call I have no idea what you are talking about. Regards, Jeff

emails.subject: RE: Monday's Conference Call
emails.body: Your assistant called and asked if I had any notes from Monday's conference call.
